headline: Is It Time To Reassess Blackstone (BX) After Recent Share Price Weakness?
summary: If you are wondering whether Blackstone's current share price reflects its true worth, you are not alone. This article breaks down what that means in practical terms for you. Blackstone recently closed at US$114.83, with returns of 1.6% over 7 days and 7.1% over 30 days, while the year-to-date return sits at a 27.7% decline and the 1-year return at a 6.6% decline. These moves sit against a longer backdrop where 3-year returns are 47.7% and 5-year returns are 71.8%. This can change how...
